workspace.dragFeedsHint: Drag feeds from the library or click "+ Add feed"
workspace.selectTemplateHint: Pick a ready-made ration for a quick start
workspace.headCountHint: Changing head count automatically scales feed amounts, total nutrient demand, and ration cost for the group.
workspace.optimizationExactDesc: The latest calculation satisfied the active reference.
workspace.optimizationClosestDesc: The latest calculation returned the best available ration. Remaining deviations are listed below.
workspace.optimizationFeedbackStaleDesc: This calculation summary no longer matches the current ration or reference. Run the calculation again to refresh it.

ration.appliedChangesDesc: These feeds were added during the latest calculation and are already included in the current ration.

nutrients.addFeedsToSee: Add feeds to see nutrient balance
nutrients.referenceCheckAligned: The current ration is within the selected reference on the main modeled indicators.
nutrients.referenceCheckDriftDesc: The current ration already deviates from the selected reference on these main indicators:
nutrients.presetTemplateWarning: The selected preset should be treated as a starting template under the current library data, not as a validated final ration.
nutrients.presetBaselineAligned: The loaded preset "{{preset}}" still matches the selected reference under the current library data.
nutrients.presetBaselineDriftDesc: The loaded preset "{{preset}}" no longer matches the selected reference under the current library data.
nutrients.advisoryVitaminNote: These values are available from the feed library and are shown for review only. They are not direct optimization targets in the current model.
nutrients.vitaminPolicyCattleGeneral: The current model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E. Carotene remains a direct feed-library reference value.
nutrients.vitaminPolicyCattleDairyHighYield: The current model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E. Carotene remains visible as a feed-library reference indicator in high-yield dairy rations.
nutrients.vitaminPolicySwineFattening: The current model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E on the implemented feed surface.
nutrients.vitaminPolicySwineBreeding: The current model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E on the implemented feed surface.
nutrients.vitaminPolicyPoultryBroiler: The current model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E on the implemented feed surface.
nutrients.vitaminPolicyPoultryLayer: The current model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E on the implemented feed surface.
nutrients.vitaminPolicyCattle: The current optimization model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E. Carotene remains a direct feed-library reference value.
nutrients.vitaminPolicySwinePoultry: The current optimization model directly controls vitamin D3 and vitamin E on the implemented feed surface.
nutrients.referenceSourceFallback: Local compatibility fallback in use. Reconnect the backend to refresh the resolved norm set.

economics.addFeedsToSee: Add feeds to see cost analysis

report.reportDescription: Generate a detailed report of the current ration including nutrient analysis, cost breakdown, and norm comparison.
report.destinationPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default export folder
report.fileNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the report title

feedLibrary.title: Feed Library
feedLibrary.catalogLiveNote: The library is currently served by the backend from the active local database.
feedLibrary.catalogFallbackNote: The backend catalog is unavailable. The library is currently using the generated fallback catalog.
feedLibrary.catalogEntriesNote: {{count}} entries in the current library view.
feedLibrary.syncSuccess: Catalog synchronized. {{feeds}} feeds available; {{prices}} prices updated.
feedLibrary.noFeedsFound: No feeds found. Click "Synchronize" to import.
feedLibrary.criticalNoGaps: No critical field gaps were detected for this feed in the current context.
feedLibrary.suitabilityContext: Assessed for the currently selected animal type and production phase.
feedLibrary.suitabilityMaxInclusion: Catalog inclusion limit: up to {{value}}% of the ration basis.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteSpeciesMatch: The feed is explicitly labeled for the current animal type.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteSpeciesMismatch: The feed is explicitly labeled for another animal type and is excluded from this ration context.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteStageMatch: The feed is labeled for the current production phase.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteStageMismatch: The feed is labeled for another production phase and is excluded from this ration context.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteStageConfirm: This is a phase-specific formula; confirm the production phase before using it outside a saved ration context.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteCattleClassMatch: The feed is labeled for the current cattle class.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteCattleClassMismatch: The feed is labeled for another cattle class and is excluded from this ration context.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteCattleClassConfirm: This is a cattle-class-specific formula; confirm the cattle class before using it outside a saved ration context.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteLayerShell: Shell grit for layers is intended for egg-producing poultry, not for broiler formulations.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteRawPotatoPoultry: Raw potato materials are excluded from the poultry candidate set in the current model.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNotePotatoConditional: Potato materials require confirmation of processing state and inclusion level before use.
feedLibrary.suitabilityNoteMaxInclusion: Respect the species-specific inclusion limit from the catalog metadata.
feedLibrary.suitabilityLiveNote: Contextual suitability checks are active for the current animal type and production phase.
feedLibrary.suitabilityFallbackNote: Contextual suitability checks are unavailable while the library is running on fallback data.
feedLibrary.noVisibleFeeds: All currently available feeds are hidden by the species filter. Enable "Show all feeds" to review restricted options.
feedLibrary.restrictedAddError: This feed is excluded for the current animal context and cannot be added from the library.
feedLibrary.restrictedAddTitle: Excluded for the current animal context
feedLibrary.batchAddToFarmSuccess: Added {{count}} feeds to the farm bucket.
feedLibrary.batchRemoveFromFarmSuccess: Removed {{count}} feeds from the farm bucket.

agent.welcomeDescription: I can help you optimize rations, analyze nutritional balance, and answer questions about animal feeding.

settings.appearanceDescription: Customize how Felex looks on your device.
settings.agentDescription: Configure the AI assistant for feed recommendations.
settings.webSearchDescription: Allow agent to search the web for information
settings.databaseDescription: Review the active feed catalog, sync state, and data coverage served by the backend.
settings.syncSuccess: Catalog synchronized. {{feeds}} feeds available; {{prices}} prices updated.
settings.feedRecordsHint: Current rows available in the active local catalog.
settings.translationCoverageHint: Feeds with a distinct English display name.
settings.completeProfilesHint: Feeds with complete energy, protein, fiber, and mineral coverage for their category.
settings.priceCoverageHint: Feeds with a current price value in the active local catalog.
settings.criticalCoverageBody: Audited candidate feeds for representative cattle, swine, and poultry contexts. This view highlights whether the current database exposes the nutrient fields that are limiting ration construction.
settings.criticalNoGaps: No repeated critical field gaps were detected for this context.
settings.dataAuthorityBody: The backend-served local feed database is the active runtime authority for library and settings screens.
settings.dataAuthorityHint: Generated frontend catalog files are a fallback path only and should not be treated as the primary source when the backend is available.
settings.closureGateReady: Database and nutrient visibility are aligned for the current closure criteria.
settings.closureGateOpen: Open catalog and nutrient coverage issues still require attention before full closure.
settings.closureIssueTranslations: {{count}} feeds still expose only the source-language display name.
settings.closureIssueProfiles: {{count}} feeds still remain in the limited-profile tier.
settings.closureIssuePrices: {{count}} feeds still have no current price value.
settings.closureIssueCriticalContexts: {{count}} contexts still report repeated missing critical fields.
settings.notificationsRuntimeNote: These toggles control in-app notifications used by the current desktop build.
settings.nutrientWarningsDescription: Alert when nutrients are out of range
settings.priceSyncNotificationsDescription: Show a notification after price synchronization succeeds or fails
settings.exportNotificationsDescription: Show a notification when export finishes
settings.agentNotificationsDescription: Show notifications for agent availability and reload state
settings.costAlertsDescription: Alert when ration cost exceeds threshold

prices.title: Feed Prices
prices.directDetails: This price was taken from a directly referenced source page.
prices.benchmarkDetails: This is a derived estimate based on observed prices for comparable feeds. The system uses the closest available comparison group.
prices.seedDetails: This price comes from catalog data.
prices.unknownDetails: The basis of this price could not be classified.

optimize.title: Ration calculation
optimize.description: Choose the calculation scenario and method. The system will adjust feed amounts within the active constraints and compare the ration with the selected reference.
optimize.intentSelectedOnlyDesc: Keep the current feed set and recalculate only their amounts.
optimize.intentCompleteLibraryDesc: Keep the current feeds and add missing feeds from the library when needed.
optimize.intentBuildLibraryDesc: Assemble a starting ration from the library and then balance it.
optimize.linearBalanceDesc: Balances the ration with a single linear formulation and unrestricted feed changes.
optimize.tieredBalanceDesc: Balances the ration by priority groups with bounded changes in feed amounts.
optimize.repairBalanceDesc: Adds missing feeds from the library and then recalculates the ration.
optimize.quickBalanceDesc: Performs one balancing pass with wider freedom to change feed amounts.
optimize.minimizeCostDesc: Searches for the least expensive feasible ration.
optimize.balancedDesc: Balance between cost and nutrient targets, aiming for optimal values
optimize.fixedFeedsDesc: Changes only unlocked feeds and preserves the fixed quantities.
optimize.herdSizeHint: The ration is calculated per head and then scaled to the full group.
optimize.successMessage: Calculation completed. Feed amounts were updated.
optimize.bestAchievableMessage: The best available ration was applied. Some deviations remain.
optimize.starterBuilt: A starting ration from the library was prepared before balancing.
optimize.autoRepairApplied: Missing feeds were added from the library during calculation.
optimize.emptyStarterHint: For an empty or sparse ration, the system can assemble a starting ration from the library before balancing.
optimize.noStarter: The current feed library is insufficient to assemble a starting ration.
optimize.errorMessage: The calculation could not be completed. Repeat the attempt.
optimize.noSolution: No feasible ration was found. Expand the feed set or allow library completion.
optimize.noteSelectedOnlyUsesBalance: The calculation was limited to the current feeds, so library completion was not used.
optimize.noteLibraryStartsWithRepair: Library completion starts with a balancing pass that can add missing feeds.
optimize.noteStarterBuilt: A starting ration was assembled from the library.
optimize.noteStarterFeedsAdded_one: The current ration was supplemented with {{count}} starter feed from the library.
optimize.noteStarterFeedsAdded_other: The current ration was supplemented with {{count}} starter feeds from the library.
optimize.noteSelectedOnlyNeedsLibrary: The current feed set does not satisfy the reference. Allow library completion to add the missing feeds.
optimize.noteLibraryStillInsufficient: The current feed library is insufficient to obtain a feasible ration.
optimize.noteBestSelectedOnly: The best available result was obtained for the current feed set.
optimize.noteAllowLibraryCompletion: Allow library completion if missing feeds may be added automatically.
optimize.noteBestCompleteLibrary: The ration was supplemented from the library as far as possible.
optimize.noteBestBuildLibrary: The best available ration was assembled from the current library.
optimize.noteBalancedSelectedOnly: The current feed set was balanced without adding feeds from the library.
optimize.noteBalancedCompleteLibrary: The ration was supplemented from the library and balanced.
optimize.noteBalancedBuildLibrary: The ration was assembled from the library and balanced.
optimize.noteSelectedReferenceUsed: The selected reference was used during ration assembly.
optimize.noteStarterUnavailable: A starting ration could not be assembled from the current feed library.
optimize.noteKeptCurrentFallback: The current ration was kept because the closest solvable fallback reduced core adequacy.
optimize.noteKeptCurrentHardConstraint: The current ration was kept because the optimized alternative lost a hard nutrient constraint.
optimize.noteConstructorTriedSets_one: The starting ration was selected from {{count}} library candidate set.
optimize.noteConstructorTriedSets_other: The starting ration was selected from {{count}} library candidate sets.
optimize.noteAutoAddedFeeds_one: {{count}} feed was added from the library. The list below explains its role.
optimize.noteAutoAddedFeeds_other: {{count}} feeds were added from the library. The list below explains their roles.
optimize.referenceDriftTitle: Current ration already deviates from the selected reference
optimize.referenceDriftDesc: The calculation will first correct the main deviations listed below.
optimize.noteNoStarterGroup: No suitable starting feed was found for the {{group}} group.
optimize.reasonMethionineCystine: Covers the sulfur amino acid deficit.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.selectGroupHint: Select an animal group from the navigator to get started.
dashboard.presetConfirm: Current ration will be replaced. Continue?
dashboard.noPresets: Preset catalog is unavailable right now.
dashboard.noPresetSelected: Select a preset to inspect the matched feeds.
dashboard.noRecommendationMatches: No local feed matches were found for this recommendation yet.

norms.title: Feeding Norms
norms.description: Reference nutritional norms for different animal groups (VIZh, Kalashnikov, NRC).
norms.selectGroup: Select an animal group to view norms
norms.methodologyActiveOnly: Live methodology traceability is shown for the active ration group and preset. Return to the active selection to inspect the resolved calculations.
norms.methodologyUnavailable: Backend methodology traceability is unavailable. Reconnect the backend to inspect the resolved calculations.

methodologyMode.referenceTableDescription: Nutrient requirements taken directly from published reference tables without interpolation.
methodologyMode.referenceTableFormulas: Nutrient ranges are obtained from the resolved reference group without dynamic modification.
methodologyMode.dairyInterpolationDescription: Requirements calculated from live weight and fat-corrected milk yield using factorial equations.
methodologyMode.dairyInterpolationFormulas:
- Dry matter intake: DMI = f(BW, FCM)
- Net energy for lactation: NEL = NEm + NEl
- Protein and minerals scaled from modeled intake
methodologyMode.swineInterpolationDescription: Requirements interpolated from live weight and average daily gain reference points.
methodologyMode.swineInterpolationFormulas:
- Feed intake: FI = f(BW, ADG)
- SID amino acids: scaled to energy density
- Minerals: proportional to growth rate
methodologyMode.contextScalingDescription: Base requirements scaled by production parameters within defined bounds.
methodologyMode.contextScalingFormulas: Adjustment factors applied to intake, energy, protein, and micronutrient groups based on production context.

norms.methodologyCalcDesc: Norms are calculated as: base maintenance requirement + production requirement (milk, gain, eggs). Maintenance depends on body weight; production depends on yield level.
norms.methodologyAdjDesc: Norms can be adjusted based on specific farm conditions: breed, climate, physiological state, feed quality. Click "Edit" to manually adjust values.

methodologyReferences.title: References
methodologyReferences.kalashnikov2003: Kalashnikov, A.P. et al. (2003) Norms and Rations for Farm Animals. 3rd ed. Moscow: Kolos.
methodologyReferences.nrc2001: NRC (2001) Nutrient Requirements of Dairy Cattle. 7th ed. Washington: National Academies Press.
methodologyReferences.vnitip2017: VNITIP (2017) Poultry Feeding Guidelines. Sergiev Posad: VNITIP.

fileExplorer.title: PROJECTS
fileExplorer.emptyWorkspace: No projects yet. Click "+" to create a ration.
fileExplorer.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
fileExplorer.movePrompt: Enter destination folder relative to the workspace root. Leave blank for the root.

optimizer.windowHint: Keep the ration page compact and use the separate window for full feed and nutrient comparison.
optimizer.comparisonSummary: Compare complete feed sets and nutrient targets in a separate expanded window.
optimizer.percentOfTargetHint: Bars are shown only when an optimal target exists; percentages mean % of target.
